scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:chat" "npm run dev:media" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd auth-service && npm install && cd ../user-service && npm install && cd ../chat-service && npm install && cd ../media-service && npm install && cd ../api-gateway && npm install
scripts.build: cd auth-service && npm run build && cd ../user-service && npm run build && cd ../chat-service && npm run build && cd ../media-service && npm run build && cd ../api-gateway && npm run build
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:user" "npm run start:chat" "npm run start:media" "npm run start:gateway"
